svg.title: AWS Cloud-Native RAG Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture diagram showing how a RAG Document Co-Pilot is migrated to AWS, covering ingestion, embedding, retrieval, and generation phases.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about hosting Streamlit on EC2 for this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about S3 bucket setup for PDF storage')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda function do in this RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does PDF text extraction work in Lambda with PyPDF or Textract?')
sendPrompt('Explain the chunking strategy used in this pipeline')
sendPrompt('How does embedding work — SentenceTransformers vs Bedrock Titan embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How are embeddings stored and indexed in AWS OpenSearch?')
sendPrompt('What metadata do we store in MongoDB for this pipeline?')
g.text: Chunk metadata · doc IDs · ingestion logs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the query flow from the UI to OpenSearch?')
sendPrompt('How is the user query embedded for semantic search?')
sendPrompt('Explain kNN vs ANN retrieval in OpenSearch for RAG')
sendPrompt('How are retrieved chunks assembled into a prompt for Bedrock?')
sendPrompt('How do we call Bedrock Claude/Titan in this RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How is the final LLM answer rendered back in the Streamlit UI?')
sendPrompt('What IAM roles and CloudWatch setup do we need for this architecture?')
g.text: Permissions · logging · monitoring — applies to every service above
